languages.text: {n}Ваша собеседница качает головой, не сводя взгляда со своей жертвы.{/n} "Они все связаны. Они все — одна гнойная рана на теле вашего экипажа..."
{n}Your interlocutor shakes her head, keeping her eyes on her victim.{/n} "They're all connected. They are all one festering wound on the body of your crew..."
languages.original_text: {n}Ваша собеседница качает головой, не сводя взгляда со своей жертвы.{/n} "Они все связаны. Они все — одна гнойная рана на теле вашего экипажа..."

languages.text: {n}相手は目を離さず、首を横に振る。{/n}「みんな繋がっている。みんな、君の船の腐った傷だ…」
languages.original_text: {n}Your interlocutor shakes her head, keeping her eyes on her victim.{/n} "They're all connected. They are all one festering wound on the body of your crew..."

traits.locale_text: {n}相手は目を離さず、首を横に振る。「みんな繋がっている。みんな、君の船の腐った傷だ…」

languages.text: {n}Muhatabın, gözlerini kurbandan ayırmaz vaziyette başını iki yana sallıyor.{/n} "Hepsi bağlantılı. Hepsi, mürettebatınızın vücudundaki tek bir irinli yara..."
languages.original_text: {n}Your interlocutor shakes her head, keeping her eyes on her victim.{/n} "They're all connected. They are all one festering wound on the body of your crew..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Muhatabın, gözlerini kurbandan ayırmaz vaziyette başını iki yana sallıyor.{/n} "Hepsi bağlantılı. Hepsi, mürettebatınızın vücudundaki tek bir irinli yara..."

languages.text: {n}Tu interlocutora niega con la cabeza sin apartar la mirada de su víctima.{/n} «Están todos conectados. Todos ellos son una misma herida infectada en el cuerpo de su tripulación...».
languages.original_text: {n}Your interlocutor shakes her head, keeping her eyes on her victim.{/n} "They're all connected. They are all one festering wound on the body of your crew..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tu interlocutora niega con la cabeza sin apartar la mirada de su víctima.{/n} «Están todos conectados. Todos ellos son una misma herida infectada en el cuerpo de su tripulación...».

languages.text: {n}和你对话的人摇了摇头，眼睛依然死盯着她的受害者。{/n}“他们都是一伙的。他们都是您舰队上溃烂的脓疮……”
languages.original_text: {n}Your interlocutor shakes her head, keeping her eyes on her victim.{/n} "They're all connected. They are all one festering wound on the body of your crew..."

traits.locale_text: {n}和你对话的人摇了摇头，眼睛依然死盯着她的受害者。{/n}“他们都是一伙的。他们都是您舰队上溃烂的脓疮……”

languages.text: {n}Votre interlocutrice secoue la tête, sans quitter sa victime des yeux.{/n} « Ils sont tous liés, tous inclus dans cette plaie purulente qu'ils forment sur le corps de votre équipage... »
languages.original_text: {n}Your interlocutor shakes her head, keeping her eyes on her victim.{/n} "They're all connected. They are all one festering wound on the body of your crew..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Votre interlocutrice secoue la tête, sans quitter sa victime des yeux.{/n} « Ils sont tous liés, tous inclus dans cette plaie purulente qu'ils forment sur le corps de votre équipage... »

languages.text: {n}Deine Gesprächspartnerin schüttelt den Kopf, ihr Opfer im Blick.{/n} "Sie gehören alle zusammen. Sie sind alle eine große eitrige Wunde auf dem Körper Eurer Crew ..."
